blocks.speaker: Mr. Cole
blocks.content: You've been quiet since Maple Street.

blocks.speaker: Mr. Cole
blocks.content: It is. You've been in schools before.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: I've been in schools that already knew who I was. This one doesn't.

blocks.speaker: Mr. Cole
blocks.content: Then this is better. You get to decide that yourself.

blocks.speaker: Larry
blocks.content: What if I don't know the answer yet?

blocks.speaker: Mr. Cole
blocks.content: Then today you figure out the room. That's all today is.

options.label: "There's food in the back if you're hungry."
